steps.title: Use the coefficient shortcut
steps.content: For a polynomial $ax^2+bx+c$, substituting $x=1$ gives $a+b+c$. Evaluate each polynomial at $x=1$ and add the results.

steps.title: Evaluate and add
steps.content:
Compute the two values, then add them.
$$-2(1)^2+3(1)+28=29$$
$$4(1)^2+6(1)-5=5$$
$$29+5=34$$
The answer is 34.
